executive_summary: Build failure due to missing GitHub Actions workflow file. The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404, indicating that the .github/workflows/build.yml file does not exist in the repository or is not accessible. This is a critical configuration error that prevents any build execution.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' does not exist in the repository or is not accessible. The workflow dispatch API endpoint returned HTTP 404 error.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' is missing from the repository. This could be due to: (1) The file was never created, (2) The file was deleted, (3) The file exists in a different location, (4) GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository, or (5) The authentication token lacks necessary permissions.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or restored. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment.

errors.title: Workflow Dispatch API Authentication/Permission Issue
errors.description: The GitHub API token may be missing required workflow or actions permissions, preventing workflow dispatch operations.
errors.error_message: Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled.
errors.root_cause: The authentication token used for workflow dispatch may lack the 'workflow' or 'actions:write' scope required to trigger GitHub Actions workflows. Alternatively, GitHub Actions may be disabled at the repository or organization level.
errors.impact: Even if the workflow file exists, builds cannot be triggered programmatically. Manual workflow triggers may also fail if Actions is disabled.

recommended_fixes.title: Create Missing GitHub Actions Workflow File
recommended_fixes.description: Create the .github/workflows/build.yml file with a standard Maven build configuration.
implementation_steps: 1. Create .github/workflows directory structure if it doesn't exist
2. Create build.yml file with Maven build steps
4. Set up Java environment and Maven cache
5. Add build, test, and package steps
6. Commit and push the workflow file
validation_criteria: Workflow file is valid YAML syntax
Workflow can be triggered via API
Workflow appears in GitHub Actions tab

recommended_fixes.title: Verify GitHub Actions Permissions and Token Scopes
recommended_fixes.description: Ensure GitHub Actions is enabled and the API token has required permissions.
implementation_steps: 1. Navigate to repository Settings > Actions > General
2. Verify 'Allow all actions and reusable workflows' is enabled
3. Check that Actions is not disabled at organization level
4. Verify API token has 'workflow' and 'repo' scopes
5. Regenerate token if necessary with correct scopes
6. Update token in automation scripts/environment variables
validation_criteria: GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
Manual workflow trigger works in GitHub UI

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error classification performed on build attempt 3. No actual build execution occurred due to missing workflow file. This is a pre-build configuration failure.
compliance_notes.security_impact: No security vulnerabilities detected. This is a configuration issue that prevents build execution.
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: Build pipeline is non-functional. Cannot verify compliance with build standards until workflow is restored.

analyzer_notes: This is a configuration error where the GitHub Actions workflow file does not exist. No actual Maven build was executed, so there are no compilation, test, or dependency errors to analyze. The primary issue is the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file. Once this file is created with proper Maven build configuration, subsequent build attempts can be analyzed for Maven-specific errors.
